name: Funnel Scoop
description: A bonus power-up that lets you grab marbles from the funnel and release them on demand.
howToPlay: Tap boxes to fill the funnel with marbles. When the funnel gets crowded, tap the golden SCOOP button (left of the funnel) to grab up to 9 marbles of the most common color and store them in a ghost box. Tap a ghost box to release its marbles back. Use this strategically to control the flow!
